result:
I now have everything needed. Here's the complete list of auth-related functions, sourced from the two files identified by the MCP tools.

---

## Authentication Functions

**Files cited:** `src/utils/auth.ts`, `src/store/useAuthStore.ts`

---

### `src/utils/auth.ts`

| Function | Line | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `hexToBytes` | 12 | Converts a hex string to a `Uint8Array` (internal scrypt helper). |
| `bytesToHex` | 18 | Converts a `Uint8Array` to a hex string (internal scrypt helper). |
| `browserScryptDerive` | 22 | Runs scrypt key derivation in-browser using `scrypt-js` (N=16384, r=8, p=1). |
| `hashPassword` | 44 | Hashes a password via Electron IPC scrypt; falls back to browser `scrypt-js`. |
| `verifyPassword` | 64 | Verifies a password against a stored scrypt hash using constant-time comparison. |
| `generateRecoveryCode` | 92 | Generates a formatted 10-digit recovery code and its SHA-256 hash for one-time use. |
| `validatePasswordStrength` | 141 | Checks password against min-length, uppercase, lowercase, and digit rules. |
| `getLockoutRemaining` | 165 | Returns milliseconds remaining in a login lockout (0 if not locked). |
| `createLockoutTimestamp` | 174 | Computes an ISO timestamp 15 minutes in the future for a new lockout. |

---

### `src/store/useAuthStore.ts`

These are Zustand store action functions (defined inline in the store object):

| Function | ~Line | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `parseSetupToken` | 203 | Parses an `internal-app-`/`BAGS-`-prefixed setup token into repo slug, PAT, and encryption key. |
| `validateGithubToken` | 236 | Validates a GitHub PAT against the GitHub `/user` API; uses Electron IPC if available. |
| `installPAT` | ~292 | Silently validates, encrypts, and persists a GitHub PAT without changing app flow or mode. |
| `login` | ~322 | Validates a PAT, detects Tech vs. Admin role, and sets a full authenticated session. |
| `loginWithSetupToken` | ~368 | Parses a setup token, validates the embedded PAT, and establishes sync config + session. |
| `logout` | ~406 | Clears session-level state (active store, local user, auth mode) while preserving the permanent PAT. |
| `restoreSession` | ~423 | Restores PAT and user profile from Electron safeStorage (or localStorage) on app startup. |
| `changePassword` | ~475 | Verifies the current password, hashes the new one, updates local state + GitHub vault. |
| `localLogin` | ~566 | Authenticates a local employee/manager with password + lockout enforcement + recovery code fallback. |
| `localLogout` | ~640 | Clears the local user session without affecting the GitHub PAT. |
| `verifyOrgKey` | ~718 | Searches all GitHub repos for a matching `org_key.json` to verify and establish sync config. |
| `verifyLicense` | ~762 | Validates the installed org key + active store keys against GitHub; revokes locally if expired. |
| `checkOfflineLock` | ~705 | Returns `true` if the machine has not synced for more than 2 weeks. |
| `isSetupComplete` | ~800 | Returns `true` only when PAT, install mode, and org key are all configured. |
